description: A perfect addition to your daily wardrobe, this sandal from catwalk is crafted from durable material with fashionable cutouts to offer exemplary comfort without compromising on style. Upper Synthetic leather straps on the forefoot with diamond patterned cut-outs Heel cup to lock the foot in place A strap connecting the forefoot straps to the heel cup with an elasticated band for a snug Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Textured TPU outsole with waffle pattern lugs on the heel for absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
